name: si-learning-red
description: Software de simulación interactiva para la enseñanza de redes

scripts.dev: npm run db:sqlite:setup -w apps/api && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:pg: concurrently -n docker,api,web -c gray,blue,green "docker compose up" "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
